lines.original: * Metaformeln die generierten Formeln als Instanzen eintragen zu
lines.translated: * metaformulas to register the generated formulas as instances

lines.original: 4) Weiterhin can man festlegen, wie this externe objects (ExternalObject, ExternalQuery) geladen and stored are shall.
lines.translated: 4) Furthermore, one can specify how these external objects (ExternalObject, ExternalQuery) shall be loaded and stored.

lines.original: /*      id : ID der Regel (kein ID des Objektspeichers!)             */
lines.translated: /*      id : rule ID (not an object-store ID!)             */
